caption: A man with white hair and a white beard, dressed in a cream-colored traditional Indian outfit consisting of a long tunic and a matching sleeveless vest, stands behind a brown wooden podium. He is positioned in front of a textured, dark green geometric wall. Two microphones are mounted on the podium, extending toward him. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, initially looking forward with a neutral expression. As the scene progresses, he continues to talk and then brings his hands together in a prayer-like gesture, known as Namaste, near his face. To his right, a vertical gold-colored column with decorative red floral accents stands against the green wall. The background remains constant while the man's facial expressions and hand movements change as he addresses an audience.
